data.title: Infinix launches HOT 60 Pro+, world's slimmest 3D-curved screen phone at 5.95mm. New series includes HOT 60 Pro, 5G, and 60i.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, Infinix launched their newest HOT 60 Series in Hong Kong, consisting of the HOT 60 Pro+, HOT 60 Pro, HOT 60 5G, and HOT 60i models. The highlight of the lineup is the Infinix HOT 60 Pro+ which features an incredibly thin body measuring 5.95mm.

data.title: Portland General Electric reports 16.5% industrial load growth in Q2 2025, driven by data centers, advancing recovery efforts and investments. Reaffirms 2025 outlook.
data.description: The financial results for the second quarter show a notable increase in demand from data center clients, leading to a 16.5% growth in industrial load compared to the previous quarter. Progress has been made in the recovery of the Seaside battery, investments in the distribution system, and restructuring of the holding company. These developments are part of efforts to boost growth. The company has restated its adjusted targets for 2025.

data.title: Aurora Mobile in China is exploring quantum computing for business innovation and growth. Explores tech integration.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Shenzhen, China, Aurora Mobile Limited (NASDAQ: JG), a prominent provider of customer engagement and marketing technology services in China, revealed its plans to incorporate emerging technologies, specifically quantum computing, into its current operations. The company, known for its proficiency in customer engagement and extensive data ecosystem, anticipates that quantum computing will play a pivotal role in its forthcoming growth and innovative endeavors.

data.title: European companies are increasingly adopting Google Cloud ecosystem for AI tools, as per ISG.
data.description: In London, according to ISG, European businesses are quickly progressing their cloud strategies, frequently utilizing artificial intelligence (AI) tools and services within the growing Google Cloud ecosystem.
IAEA Chief Grossi says there is "No further information from Iran on enriched uranium" at this time.

data.title: 3 miners rescued from collapsed gold and copper mine in British Columbia after a major operation on Tuesday.
data.description: On Tuesday, a group of miners found themselves trapped beneath the surface at a gold and copper mine in British Columbia. This incident has triggered a significant rescue effort to retrieve the miners from underground.

data.title: Boeing benefits from trade deals, gaining more plane orders due to US agreements, but link to Trump's strategy unclear.
data.description: Nations that have reached deals with the United States have committed to purchasing additional Boeing aircraft. The exact impact of President Trump's negotiation strategies on these agreements remains uncertain.

data.title: Maine Coffee Company raises prices due to President Trump's trade war, costs surge, options depleted.
data.description: Rock City Coffee, similarly to numerous businesses, held off on raising prices due to the impact of President Trump's trade war on its costs. However, faced with limited choices, the company eventually had to increase its prices.

data.title: Food brands face challenges as consumer preferences shift. Companies adapt to maintain profitability amidst changing trends.
data.description: Food companies that produce packaged goods are facing challenges in adapting to shifting consumer preferences and economic conditions. This industry is finding it difficult to maintain profitability as consumers' tastes, health concerns, and disposable income levels evolve. The shifting trends in consumption patterns are pressuring these companies to innovate their product offerings to stay competitive in the market.

data.title: Ether outperforming Bitcoin in US ETF market as BTC ETFs lose $285M; Research predicts ETH to take the lead.
data.description: A significant topic of discussion in the US spot ETF market is the comparison between Ether and Bitcoin. According to Swissblock research, there is a prediction that in the long run, Ether will emerge as the more successful option. This analysis indicates a growing interest in Ether over Bitcoin within the ETF sector in the United States.

data.title: Bybit invests $1M in EthicHub, moving 100 tons of LATAM coffee to premium markets. Partnered with BGA to aid financial growth.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Dubai, UAE, it was announced that the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange, Bybit, has made notable advancements in its collaboration with EthicHub. EthicHub, a project backed by the Blockchain for Good Alliance (BGA), aims to enhance financial services. Bybit, known for its high trading volume, is strengthening its partnership with EthicHub to work towards achieving this goal.
